name: 07_condition_met_count_three_to_four_hit
description: Condition met, count=3 -> 4. Already above threshold; hit remains True. NOTE: inline producer uses `elif >= 3` so the hit fires for any count after increment >= 3.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -3.0 <= -1.10 is TRUE. MC: 10.0 < 60.0 is TRUE. Condition met. new_count = 3 + 1 = 4. Hit = (4 >= 3) is True. Pinned because the inline producer's `elif >= 3` (not `== 3`) means the hit stays True for arbitrarily high counts after the threshold has been crossed; an impl using strict equality would fail this.
